title: Rift Realms Utility
description: A utility mod for the Rift Realms server
body:
# Rift Realms Utility

Riftrealmsutils is a Minecraft mod that provides various utilities for managing player tags and other features

RIFT REALMS UTILITY IS DISCONTINUED
It is being split into separate mods, two of them are already released for 1.21.1
- [Riftname](https://modrinth.com/mod/riftname) - Nametag features
- [Riftbone](https://modrinth.com/mod/riftbone) - Graves
## Features

- **Player Tags**: Set, clear, and display custom tags for players.
- **Nick names**: Set and clear nick names.
- **Name styles**: Set and clear the formatting used for your name.
- **Broadcast Control**: Enable or disable broadcast messages for player join/leave events.

- **Graves**: Graves holding player's inventory and trinkets, inspired in visuals by those on Content SMP.
- **Boat step height modification**: Set how high boats can step. Useful for making boat highways. Only applies to boats placed after the command is run

### Commands

- **/togglebroadcast**: Toggles the broadcast of player join/leave messages. Requires operator level 2.
- **/boatstepheight \<height\>**: Sets the step height for all boats placed afterwards. Requires operator level 4.
- **/playertag set \<tagName\>**: Sets a custom tag for the player. Requires the command to be executed by a player.
- **/playertag clear**: Clears the custom tag for the player. Requires the command to be executed by a player.
- **/formatname add \<formatting\>**: Adds a custom formatting to the player's name. Requires the command to be executed by a player.
- **/formatname clear**: Removes all formattings from player's name. Requires the command to be executed by a player.
- **/nick set \<tagName\>**: Sets a custom nickname for the player. Requires the command to be executed by a player.
- **/nick clear**: Clears the custom nickname for the player. Requires the command to be executed by a player.
